bot_specs.backtest_code:
import MetaTrader5 as mt5 import pandas as pd import numpy as np import json import os from datetime import datetime # ============ CONFIG ============ SYMBOLS = ['STOXX50', 'DE40', 'NETH25', 'SE30', 'UK100', 'XTIUSD', 'XAUUSD', 'BTCUSD'] INITIAL_EQUITY = 10000.0 BARS_M5 = 50000 BARS_M15 = 20000 BARS_H1 = 8000 ATR_PERIOD = 14 ADX_PERIOD = 14 ADX_THRESHOLD = 25 MACD_FAST = 12 MACD_SLOW = 26 MACD_SIGNAL = 9 SWING_LEFT = 3 SWING_RIGHT = 3 SL_MULT = 1.5 TP_MULT = 3.0 MAX_HOLD_BARS = 24 MAX_POSITIONS = 6 LOOKBACK_DIV = 60 # bars to look for previous swing # IC Markets Raw commission per lot per side (USD) COMMISSION_PER_LOT = 3.5 RISK_PER_TRADE = 0.01 # 1% risk CHECKPOINT_FILE = 'backtest_checkpoint.json' TRADES_CSV = 'trades_obv_macd_div.csv' REPORT_HTML = 'report_obv_macd_div.html' # ============ INDICATORS ============ def atr(df, period=14): h, l, c = df['high'], df['low'], df['close'] tr = pd.concat([(h-l), (h-c.shift()).abs(), (l-c.shift()).abs()], axis=1).max(axis=1) return tr.rolling(period).mean() def adx_di(df, period=14): h, l, c = df['high'], df['low'], df['close'] up = h.diff() dn = -l.diff() plus_dm = np.where((up > dn) & (up > 0), up, 0.0) minus_dm = np.where((dn > up) & (dn > 0), dn, 0.0) tr = pd.concat([(h-l), (h-c.shift()).abs(), (l-c.shift()).abs()], axis=1).max(axis=1) atr_ = tr.rolling(period).mean() plus_di = 100 * pd.Series(plus_dm, index=df.index).rolling(period).mean() / atr_ minus_di = 100 * pd.Series(minus_dm, index=df.index).rolling(period).mean() / atr_ dx = 100 * (plus_di - minus_di).abs() / (plus_di + minus_di).replace(0, np.nan) adx = dx.rolling(period).mean() return adx, plus_di, minus_di def obv(df): sign = np.sign(df['close'].diff().fillna(0)) return (sign * df['tick_volume']).cumsum() def macd(df, fast=12, slow=26, signal=9): ema_f = df['close'].ewm(span=fast, adjust=False).mean() ema_s = df['close'].ewm(span=slow, adjust=False).mean() macd_line = ema_f - ema_s sig = macd_line.ewm(span=signal, adjust=False).mean() return macd_line - sig # histogram as momentum proxy # ============ SWINGS ============ def find_swing_lows(series, left=3, right=3): idx = [] arr = series.values for i in range(left, len(arr)-right): seg = arr[i-left:i+right+1] if arr[i] == seg.min() and (seg == arr[i]).sum() == 1: idx.append(i) return idx def find_swing_highs(series, left=3, right=3): idx = [] arr = series.values for i in range(left, len(arr)-right): seg = arr[i-left:i+right+1] if arr[i] == seg.max() and (seg == arr[i]).sum() == 1: idx.append(i) return idx # ============ MT5 ============ def get_data(symbol, tf, n): rates = mt5.copy_rates_from_pos(symbol, tf, 0, n) if rates is None or len(rates) == 0: return None df = pd.DataFrame(rates) df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s') df.set_index('time', inplace=True) return df def get_spread_p75_and_point(symbol, df_m5): info = mt5.symbol_info(symbol) if info is None: return 0, 0.0001, 1.0 point = info.point # Approx spread from ticks if available tick = mt5.symbol_info_tick(symbol) spread_pts = info.spread if info.spread > 0 else 10 contract = info.trade_contract_size return spread_pts, point, contract # ============ BACKTEST ============ def backtest_symbol(symbol): print(f"\n=== {symbol} ===") df5 = get_data(symbol, mt5.TIMEFRAME_M5, BARS_M5) df15 = get_data(symbol, mt5.TIMEFRAME_M15, BARS_M15) df1h = get_data(symbol, mt5.TIMEFRAME_H1, BARS_H1) if df5 is None or df15 is None or df1h is None: print(f"No data for {symbol}") return [], INITIAL_EQUITY, [] # Liquidity filter df5 = df5[df5['tick_volume'] > 0].copy() # Indicators df5['atr'] = atr(df5, ATR_PERIOD) df5['adx'], df5['pdi'], df5['mdi'] = adx_di(df5, ADX_PERIOD) df5['obv'] = obv(df5) df5['macd_hist'] = macd(df5, MACD_FAST, MACD_SLOW, MACD_SIGNAL) df15['adx'], _, _ = adx_di(df15, ADX_PERIOD) df1h['adx'], df1h['pdi'], df1h['mdi'] = adx_di(df1h, ADX_PERIOD) # Reindex M15/H1 to M5 (forward fill) df5['adx_m15'] = df15['adx'].reindex(df5.index, method='ffill') df5['pdi_h1'] = df1h['pdi'].reindex(df5.index, method='ffill') df5['mdi_h1'] = df1h['mdi'].reindex(df5.index, method='ffill') df5 = df5.dropna().reset_index() # Find swings (confirmed = exclude last SWING_RIGHT bars) swing_lows = find_swing_lows(df5['low'], SWING_LEFT, SWING_RIGHT) swing_highs = find_swing_highs(df5['high'], SWING_LEFT, SWING_RIGHT) sl_set = set(swing_lows) sh_set = set(swing_highs) # Cost & sizing spread_pts, point, contract = get_spread_p75_and_point(symbol, df5) spread_price = spread_pts * point equity = INITIAL_EQUITY equity_curve = [] trades = [] open_pos = [] # list of dicts consec_losses = 0 pause_until = None daily_start_equity = equity current_day = None daily_dd_block = False total_peak = equity halted = False for i in range(len(df5)): row = df5.iloc[i] t = row['time'] day = t.date() if current_day != day: current_day = day daily_start_equity = equity daily_dd_block = False # Drawdown checks total_peak = max(total_peak, equity) if (total_peak - equity) / total_peak > 0.20: halted = True if (daily_start_equity - equity) / daily_start_equity > 0.10: daily_dd_block = True # Process open positions: check exit at this bar still_open = [] for pos in open_pos: # Check SL/TP using high/low of current bar hit_sl = False; hit_tp = False; exit_price = None; exit_reason = '' if pos['dir'] == 'LONG': if row['low'] <= pos['sl']: exit_price = pos['sl']; hit_sl = True; exit_reason = 'SL' elif row['high'] >= pos['tp']: exit_price = pos['tp']; hit_tp = True; exit_reason = 'TP' else: if row['high'] >= pos['sl']: exit_price = pos['sl']; hit_sl = True; exit_reason = 'SL' elif row['low'] <= pos['tp']: exit_price = pos['tp']; hit_tp = True; exit_reason = 'TP' # Timeout: close at Open of bar where timeout occurs if exit_price is None and (i - pos['entry_idx']) >= MAX_HOLD_BARS: exit_price = row['open']; exit_reason = 'TIMEOUT' if exit_price is not None: if pos['dir'] == 'LONG': pnl = (exit_price - pos['entry_price']) * pos['lots'] * contract else: pnl = (pos['entry_price'] - exit_price) * pos['lots'] * contract equity += pnl pnl_pct = pnl / INITIAL_EQUITY * 100 trades.append({ 'symbol': symbol, 'direction': pos['dir'], 'entry_time': pos['entry_time'], 'entry_price': pos['entry_price'], 'exit_time': t, 'exit_price': exit_price, 'sl': pos['sl'], 'tp': pos['tp'], 'lots': pos['lots'], 'pnl': pnl, 'pnl_pct': pnl_pct, 'obv_div': pos['obv_div'], 'macd_div': pos['macd_div'], 'exit_reason': exit_reason }) if pnl < 0: consec_losses += 1 if consec_losses >= 3: pause_until = t + pd.Timedelta(hours=4) else: consec_losses = 0 else: still_open.append(pos) open_pos = still_open equity_curve.append({'time': t, 'equity': equity}) if halted or daily_dd_block: continue if pause_until is not None and t < pause_until: continue if len(open_pos) >= MAX_POSITIONS: continue # Signal detection at bar i (confirmed swing must be at i - SWING_RIGHT) sig_idx = i - SWING_RIGHT if sig_idx < LOOKBACK_DIV: continue adx5 = row['adx']; adx15 = row['adx_m15'] pdi_h1 = row['pdi_h1']; mdi_h1 = row['mdi_h1'] atr_v = row['atr'] if pd.isna(adx5) or pd.isna(adx15) or pd.isna(atr_v): continue if adx5 < ADX_THRESHOLD or adx15 < ADX_THRESHOLD: continue direction = None obv_div = False; macd_div = False # LONG: H1 bull, last swing low at sig_idx, prev swing low before if pdi_h1 > mdi_h1 and sig_idx in sl_set: prev_lows = [j for j in swing_lows if j < sig_idx and j >= sig_idx - LOOKBACK_DIV] if prev_lows: p = prev_lows[-1] price_ll = df5['low'].iloc[sig_idx] < df5['low'].iloc[p] obv_hl = df5['obv'].iloc[sig_idx] > df5['obv'].iloc[p] macd_hl = df5['macd_hist'].iloc[sig_idx] > df5['macd_hist'].iloc[p] if price_ll and (obv_hl or macd_hl): direction = 'LONG' obv_div = obv_hl; macd_div = macd_hl # SHORT if direction is None and mdi_h1 > pdi_h1 and sig_idx in sh_set: prev_highs = [j for j in swing_highs if j < sig_idx and j >= sig_idx - LOOKBACK_DIV] if prev_highs: p = prev_highs[-1] price_hh = df5['high'].iloc[sig_idx] > df5['high'].iloc[p] obv_lh = df5['obv'].iloc[sig_idx] < df5['obv'].iloc[p] macd_lh = df5['macd_hist'].iloc[sig_idx] < df5['macd_hist'].iloc[p] if price_hh and (obv_lh or macd_lh): direction = 'SHORT' obv_div = obv_lh; macd_div = macd_lh if direction is None: continue # Avoid duplicate signal in same bar (only one new entry per bar per symbol) if any(p['entry_idx'] == i+1 for p in open_pos): continue # Entry at Open of next bar if i+1 >= len(df5): continue entry_bar = df5.iloc[i+1] raw_entry = entry_bar['open'] # Apply spread cost at open if direction == 'LONG': entry_price = raw_entry + spread_price sl_price = entry_price - SL_MULT * atr_v tp_price = entry_price + TP_MULT * atr_v else: entry_price = raw_entry - spread_price sl_price = entry_price + SL_MULT * atr_v tp_price = entry_price - TP_MULT * atr_v # Position sizing: risk RISK_PER_TRADE of equity risk_amt = equity * RISK_PER_TRADE sl_dist = abs(entry_price - sl_price) if sl_dist <= 0 or contract <= 0: continue lots = risk_amt / (sl_dist * contract) lots = max(0.01, round(lots, 2)) # Commission deducted at open (both sides estimated) commission = COMMISSION_PER_LOT * lots * 2 equity -= commission open_pos.append({ 'dir': direction, 'entry_idx': i+1, 'entry_time': entry_bar['time'], 'entry_price': entry_price, 'sl': sl_price, 'tp': tp_price, 'lots': lots, 'obv_div': obv_div, 'macd_div': macd_div }) return trades, equity, equity_curve # ============ MAIN ============ def load_checkpoint(): if os.path.exists(CHECKPOINT_FILE): with open(CHECKPOINT_FILE) as f: return json.load(f) return {'done': [], 'results': {}} def save_checkpoint(cp): with open(CHECKPOINT_FILE, 'w') as f: json.dump(cp, f, default=str, indent=2) def generate_html(all_trades, equity_curves): import plotly.graph_objects as go from plotly.subplots import make_subplots figs_html = '' for sym, curve in equity_curves.items(): if not curve: continue df = pd.DataFrame(curve) fig = go.Figure() fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=df['time'], y=df['equity'], name=sym)) fig.update_layout(title=f'Equity {sym}', height=400) figs_html += fig.to_html(full_html=False, include_plotlyjs='cdn') # Heatmap if all_trades: tdf = pd.DataFrame(all_trades) tdf['hour'] = pd.to_datetime(tdf['entry_time']).dt.hour tdf['dow'] = pd.to_datetime(tdf['entry_time']).dt.dayofweek pivot = tdf.pivot_table(values='pnl', index='dow', columns='hour', aggfunc='sum').fillna(0) hm = go.Figure(data=go.Heatmap(z=pivot.values, x=pivot.columns, y=pivot.index, colorscale='RdYlGn')) hm.update_layout(title='PnL Heatmap (DoW x Hour)', height=400) figs_html += hm.to_html(full_html=False, include_plotlyjs=False) with open(REPORT_HTML, 'w') as f: f.write(f'

Backtest OBV+MACD Divergence

{figs_html}') def main(): if not mt5.initialize(): print('MT5 init failed'); return cp = load_checkpoint() all_trades = [] equity_curves = {} for sym in SYMBOLS: if sym in cp['done']: print(f'Skip {sym} (checkpoint)') continue try: trades, final_eq, curve = backtest_symbol(sym) all_trades.extend(trades) equity_curves[sym] = curve cp['done'].append(sym) cp['results'][sym] = {'final_equity': final_eq, 'trades': len(trades)} save_checkpoint(cp) print(f'{sym}: {len(trades)} trades, final equity {final_eq:.2f}') except Exception as e: print(f'Error {sym}: {e}') if all_trades: pd.DataFrame(all_trades).to_csv(TRADES_CSV, index=False) generate_html(all_trades, equity_curves) mt5.shutdown() print('Done') if __name__ == '__main__': main()
warnings: Indices europeos pueden tener tick_volume sintetico en MT5; validar liquidez real en live
BTCUSD 24/7 puede generar seÃ±ales en horarios de baja liquidez; considerar filtro de sesion futuro
Position sizing por contrato puede variar por simbolo (CFD vs spot); revisar trade_contract_size en cada uno
Comision IC Markets Raw para indices/CFDs puede diferir de 3.5 USD/lot; ajustar por simbolo si es necesario
ADX calculado con rolling mean simple en lugar de Wilder smoothing (RMA): los valores diferirÃ¡n de MT5 nativo, potencialmente invalidando el threshold de 25 en backtest vs live
OBV usa tick_volume sintÃ©tico en MT5 para CFDs/Ã­ndices europeos: la divergencia OBV puede ser artefacto del feed y no replicarse en live

swing_right=3 implica que la seÃ±al se detecta 3 barras DESPUÃS del swing real; la entrada en i+1 agrega otra barra de delay â entrada efectiva con 4 barras de lag (20 min en M5), parte del move ya consumido
LOOKBACK_DIV=60 barras (5h en M5) puede ser demasiado corto para divergencias vÃ¡lidas en instrumentos de baja frecuencia como Ã­ndices europeos con gaps nocturnos
El circuit breaker de 3 pÃ©rdidas consecutivas pausa 4h, pero se resetea con UNA ganancia: en mercados con alta ratio de pÃ©rdidas esto puede ser insuficiente
BTCUSD: comisiÃ³n $5/lote/lado estÃ¡ hardcodeada como $3.50 para todos los sÃ­mbolos en el cÃ³digo (COMMISSION_PER_LOT=3.5); el backtest subestima costos en BTC
Spread de BTCUSD (~$15) no se parametriza por sÃ­mbolo: el cÃ³digo usa info.spread * point de MT5 que puede no reflejar el spread real promedio de $15+ en BTC
XTIUSD (WTI crude): comisiÃ³n IC Markets puede ser por barril/contrato y diferir de $3.50/lote estÃ¡ndar; verificar contract spec

max 6 posiciones simultÃ¡neas sobre 8 instrumentos puede generar correlaciÃ³n alta en risk-off (Ã­ndices europeos STOXX50/DE40/UK100 correlacionados): el DD real puede exceder el 10% diario calculado por instrumento
El sizing `lots = risk_amt / (sl_dist * contract)` no verifica el lote mÃ­nimo ni mÃ¡ximo por sÃ­mbolo en MT5; BTC y Ã­ndices tienen restricciones distintas
Reindex de M15/H1 a M5 con ffill puede propagar valores de sesiones cerradas (gaps de fin de semana en Ã­ndices) generando seÃ±ales falsas al reopen
Sin filtro de gap: si el open del lunes estÃ¡ 3xATR lejos del cierre del viernes, el SL calculado sobre ATR viernes puede ser completamente irreal
El cÃ³digo no cierra posiciones abiertas al final del backtest de cada sÃ­mbolo: el PnL final puede estar inflado por posiciones nunca cerradas
The reliance on synthetic tick_volume could result in backtesting signals that do not translate to live trading conditions.
The potential 4-bar delay in confirming swings and executing entries means the strategy may miss out on quick-moving market conditions.
Look-ahead bias due to the way swing highs/lows are detected and indicators from different timeframes are aligned could invalidate backtest results and potentially affect live trading performance.
Handling of different symbol specifications and contract sizes could introduce errors if not handled properly across various instrument types like CFDs and spot prices.
Careful management of ATR-based stop-losses and position sizing is required, especially for symbols with high volatility like BTCUSD, to match the intended risk management approach.
critical: LOOK-AHEAD BIAS GRAVE en detecciÃ³n de swings: find_swing_lows/find_swing_highs se calculan sobre TODO el DataFrame df5 antes del loop, y swing_right=3 requiere ver 3 barras FUTURAS para confirmar el swing. El set sl_set/sh_set contiene Ã­ndices que en el momento i aÃºn no estaban confirmados. Esto invalida completamente el backtest.

LOOK-AHEAD BIAS en indicadores de soporte: df5['adx_m15'] y df5['pdi_h1']/df5['mdi_h1'] se obtienen con reindex+ffill desde DataFrames M15/H1 que tienen timestamps distintos a M5. El reindex sobre el Ã­ndice M5 puede asignar valores de barras M15/H1 que aÃºn no habÃ­an cerrado en el tiempo real de la barra M5 correspondiente, introduciendo datos futuros.

SL inviable en BTCUSD: ATR(14) M5 en BTC es tÃ­picamente $150-$400. Con SL_MULT=1.5 â SL ~$225-$600. El spread RT ($15 bid-ask + $10 comisiÃ³n RT) representa 1.6-4.4% del SL. Aunque pasa el umbral 3x spread, con sizing de 1% equity ($100 sobre $10k) y contract_size=1 BTC (~$60k-$100k), el lote calculado serÃ¡ 0.01 mÃ­nimo y el riesgo nominal no coincide con el 1% declarado: revisar que contract_size de BTCUSD en IC Markets MT5 no sea 1 BTC sino fracciÃ³n.

NETH25 y SE30 pueden no estar disponibles como sÃ­mbolos exactos en IC Markets MT5 (nombres alternativos: NL25, SWE30 o similares): el cÃ³digo retorna silenciosamente None y los omite sin alertar, generando un backtest incompleto sin error explÃ­cito.

El circuit breaker de DD total >20% compara contra total_peak pero el equity ya descuenta comisiones desde el inicio; con 8 sÃ­mbolos en loop secuencial el equity_curve es por sÃ­mbolo pero daily_start_equity y total_peak NO se comparten entre sÃ­mbolos: el DD diario del 10% y el halt del 20% son por sÃ­mbolo, no sobre la cuenta consolidada. En live, el broker opera sobre equity real consolidada, creando una discrepancia crÃ­tica entre lÃ³gica de backtest y comportamiento live.

Ausencia total de filtro de sesiÃ³n para Ã­ndices europeos (STOXX50, DE40, NETH25, SE30, UK100): el loop 24/7 generarÃ¡ seÃ±ales en horario asiÃ¡tico/americano donde el spread de estos CFDs puede ser 5-10x el spread europeo normal, haciendo el R:R inviable en live aunque el backtest use spread fijo del market info snapshot.
mt5_notes: The required indicators (OBV, MACD, ADX, ATR) can be implemented using pandas/numpy, but caution is advised regarding synthetic tick_volume in MT5 as it might not reflect real liquidity.
Entry signal detection within a 20-30 seconds polling loop is feasible, but the risk of missing a signal or observing stale data due to network delays or data access issues should be considered.
Use market orders with FILLING_IOC to ensure execution at the next M5 bar's open, though deviations from the intended entry price may occur.
Polling interval may lead to timing issues where the current conditions for divergence or trend confirmation could change slightly before orders are placed.
Ensuring that the bot correctly identifies signals without look-ahead biases and accounts for data alignment between multiple timeframes is crucial to avoid invalid assessments.

spec_fields.instrumentos: STOXX50, DE40, NETH25, SE30, UK100, XTIUSD, XAUUSD, BTCUSD
spec_fields.hipotesis: Las divergencias entre precio y volumen/momentum (OBV y MACD) en tendencias confirmadas por ADX predicen reversiones o continuaciones con buen ratio riesgo/beneficio
spec_fields.tf-apoyo: M15 (confirmaciÃ³n ADX>25), H1 (sesgo de tendencia vÃ­a +DI vs -DI)
spec_fields.sesion: no especificada (bot 24/7 con loop cada 30 segundos)
spec_fields.senal: LONG: H1 trend_bull (+DI>-DI) AND ADX_M15>25 AND divergencia bullish M5 (precio LL + OBV HL + MACD HL, o precio LL + al menos uno de OBV/MACD HL). SHORT: H1 trend_bear (-DI>+DI) AND ADX_M15>25 AND divergencia bearish M5 (precio HH + OBV LH + MACD LH, o precio HH + al menos uno de OBV/MACD LH). Swings confirmados con 3 barras a cada lado.
spec_fields.ejecucion: Orden market (ORDER_TYPE_BUY/SELL con FILLING_IOC) al cierre de la vela M5 que genera seÃ±al; desviaciÃ³n mÃ¡xima 30 puntos
spec_fields.sl: ATR Ã 1.5 (sl_mult=1.5, ATR period=14, calculado en M5)
spec_fields.tp: ATR Ã 3.0 (tp_mult=3.0, RR 1:2 segÃºn comentario en cÃ³digo)
spec_fields.filtros: ADX>25 en M5 para detectar tendencia en la barra de seÃ±al; ADX>25 en M15 como confirmaciÃ³n; sesgo H1 via +DI vs -DI; mÃ¡ximo 6 posiciones simultÃ¡neas; circuit breaker: 3 pÃ©rdidas consecutivas â pausa 4h, DD diario>10% â no operar en el dÃ­a, DD total>20% â detenciÃ³n completa

bot_specs.name: OBV + MACD Divergencia + ADX â Ãndices, EnergÃ­a, Metales, Cripto (M5/M15/H1)
bot_specs.summary: Detecta dobles divergencias OBV+MACD en M5 sobre pivots confirmados, filtradas por ADX(M15)>25 y sesgo direccional H1 (+DI/-DI). Opera reversiones en indices europeos, commodities y BTC con trailing asimetrico long/short, gestion de correlacion por grupo y circuit breakers. Diferencial: doble confirmacion de momentum + multi-TF + cola FIFO por grupo, sin solapar con bots activos.

spec.instrumentos: STOXX50, DE40, NETH25, SE30, UK100, XTIUSD, XAUUSD, BTCUSD
spec.hipotesis: Divergencias OBV+MACD vs precio sobre pivots confirmados marcan agotamiento de tendencia; ADX>25 en M15 asegura contexto direccional y sesgo H1 (+DI/-DI) filtra contra-tendencia debil. Reversion mean-reverting de corto plazo (2h) en activos con momentum extendido.
spec.tf_apoyo: M15 (ADX14 > 25), H1 (+DI vs -DI para sesgo direccional)
spec.sesion: Horario bursatil dinamico via mt5.symbol_info_sessions_trade por simbolo; BTCUSD 24/7 con bloqueo opcional por ventana de mantenimiento broker (21:00-22:00 UTC sabado); no abrir en ultimos 30 min antes del cierre; cerrar todas las posiciones antes del cierre
spec.senal: BULL: pivot low M5 confirmado con 3 barras cerradas a cada lado (pivot en i-3, validado en barra i) + precio actual lower low vs pivot previo PERO OBV higher low AND MACD higher low (doble divergencia alcista) + ADX(M15)>25 + (+DI>-DI en H1). BEAR: pivot high simetrico + OBV lower high AND MACD lower high + ADX(M15)>25 + (-DI>+DI en H1). Sin lookahead: pivot validado solo con barras cerradas pasadas.
spec.ejecucion: Market order al Open de la barra M5 siguiente al cierre con senal (ORDER_TYPE_BUY/SELL), filling IOC, deviation 30 puntos. Senal no se duplica en misma barra. Cola FIFO de senales pendientes por grupo con espera maxima 10 min (2 velas M5), luego descarta.
spec.sl: SL = entrada -/+ sl_mult * ATR(14) M5; sl_mult default 1.5; SL absoluto >= 3x spread tipico del simbolo
spec.tp: TP techo 3.0 * ATR(14) M5; cierre parcial 50% al tocar TP; mitad restante: SL movido a breakeven + trailing asimetrico (LONG: activa @ +1.5xATR, distancia 1.0xATR; SHORT: activa @ +1.0xATR, distancia 0.5xATR)
spec.timeout: 24 velas M5 (2h); cierre forzado al Open de la barra siguiente al timeout; cierre forzado tambien si quedan <30min para session close
spec.filtros: ADX(14) M15 > 25; sesgo H1 (+DI>-DI long, -DI>+DI short); maximo 2 posiciones simultaneas por grupo (EU_IDX: STOXX50/DE40/NETH25/SE30/UK100; COMMOD: XTIUSD/XAUUSD; CRYPTO: BTCUSD); circuit breaker L1: pausa 4h tras 4 perdidas consecutivas; CB L2: pausa diaria si DD>10%; riesgo 2% equity por trade; tick_volume > 0 en barra de senal
spec.params_fijos: tp_mult=3.0, atr_period=14, adx_period=14, macd=(12,26,9), pivot_left=3, pivot_right=3, timeout_bars=24, risk_pct=0.02, max_per_group=2, queue_ttl_bars=2, deviation=30, filling=IOC
spec.params_opt: sl_mult [1.0-3.0, def 1.5], trail_act_long_mult [1.0-3.0, def 1.5], trail_dist_long_mult [0.5-2.0, def 1.0], trail_act_short_mult [0.5-2.0, def 1.0], trail_dist_short_mult [0.3-1.5, def 0.5]

bot_specs.backtest_code:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Backtest: OBV-MACD Divergence Multi-Asset (M5)
IC Markets MT5 Python
"""
import os, json, math
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import MetaTrader5 as mt5
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# ---------------- CONFIG ----------------
SYMBOLS = ['STOXX50','DE40','NETH25','SE30','UK100','XTIUSD','XAUUSD','BTCUSD']
GROUPS = {
    'EU_IDX': ['STOXX50','DE40','NETH25','SE30','UK100'],
    'COMMOD': ['XTIUSD','XAUUSD'],
    'CRYPTO': ['BTCUSD']
}
INITIAL_EQUITY = 10_000.0
BARS_M5  = 60_000
BARS_M15 = 25_000
BARS_H1  = 8_000

PARAMS = {
    'atr_period': 14,
    'adx_period': 14,
    'macd_fast': 12, 'macd_slow': 26, 'macd_signal': 9,
    'pivot_left': 3, 'pivot_right': 3,
    'sl_mult': 1.5,
    'tp_mult': 3.0,
    'trail_act_long_mult': 1.5,
    'trail_dist_long_mult': 1.0,
    'trail_act_short_mult': 1.0,
    'trail_dist_short_mult': 0.5,
    'timeout_bars': 24,
    'queue_ttl_bars': 2,
    'risk_pct': 0.02,
    'max_per_group': 2,
    'min_adx': 25.0,
    'commission_per_lot': 7.0,  # IC Markets Raw round-trip USD/lot estimado
    'spread_pct_for_p75': 75,
}

OUT_DIR = 'bt_obv_macd_div'
os.makedirs(OUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
CKPT = os.path.join(OUT_DIR, 'checkpoint.json')

# ---------------- INDICADORES ----------------
def atr(df, n=14):
    h,l,c = df['high'], df['low'], df['close']
    tr = pd.concat([(h-l), (h-c.shift()).abs(), (l-c.shift()).abs()], axis=1).max(axis=1)
    return tr.rolling(n).mean()

def adx_didi(df, n=14):
    h,l,c = df['high'], df['low'], df['close']
    up = h.diff(); dn = -l.diff()
    plus_dm  = np.where((up>dn) & (up>0), up, 0.0)
    minus_dm = np.where((dn>up) & (dn>0), dn, 0.0)
    tr = pd.concat([(h-l),(h-c.shift()).abs(),(l-c.shift()).abs()],axis=1).max(axis=1)
    atr_ = tr.rolling(n).mean()
    plus_di  = 100 * pd.Series(plus_dm, index=df.index).rolling(n).mean()/atr_
    minus_di = 100 * pd.Series(minus_dm,index=df.index).rolling(n).mean()/atr_
    dx = ( (plus_di-minus_di).abs() / (plus_di+minus_di).replace(0,np.nan) )*100
    adx_ = dx.rolling(n).mean()
    return adx_, plus_di, minus_di

def macd(df, f=12, s=26, sig=9):
    ema_f = df['close'].ewm(span=f, adjust=False).mean()
    ema_s = df['close'].ewm(span=s, adjust=False).mean()
    line = ema_f - ema_s
    signal = line.ewm(span=sig, adjust=False).mean()
    return line, signal

def obv(df):
    direction = np.sign(df['close'].diff().fillna(0))
    return (direction * df['tick_volume']).cumsum()

# ---------------- DATA ----------------
def fetch(symbol, tf, bars):
    r = mt5.copy_rates_from_pos(symbol, tf, 0, bars)
    if r is None or len(r)==0: return None
    df = pd.DataFrame(r)
    df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s', utc=True)
    df.set_index('time', inplace=True)
    df = df[df['tick_volume']>0].copy()  # filtro liquidez (G)
    return df

def prepare(symbol):
    m5  = fetch(symbol, mt5.TIMEFRAME_M5,  BARS_M5)
    m15 = fetch(symbol, mt5.TIMEFRAME_M15, BARS_M15)
    h1  = fetch(symbol, mt5.TIMEFRAME_H1,  BARS_H1)
    if any(x is None or len(x)<300 for x in [m5,m15,h1]): return None
    m5['atr'] = atr(m5, PARAMS['atr_period'])
    m5['obv'] = obv(m5)
    m5['macd_line'], m5['macd_sig'] = macd(m5, PARAMS['macd_fast'], PARAMS['macd_slow'], PARAMS['macd_signal'])
    m15['adx'], m15['plus_di_m15'], m15['minus_di_m15'] = adx_didi(m15, PARAMS['adx_period'])
    _, h1['plus_di_h1'], h1['minus_di_h1'] = adx_didi(h1, PARAMS['adx_period'])
    # merge as-of
    m5 = pd.merge_asof(m5.sort_index(), m15[['adx']].sort_index(), left_index=True, right_index=True, direction='backward')
    m5 = pd.merge_asof(m5.sort_index(), h1[['plus_di_h1','minus_di_h1']].sort_index(), left_index=True, right_index=True, direction='backward')
    return m5.dropna()

# ---------------- COSTOS ----------------
def estimate_costs(symbol, df):
    info = mt5.symbol_info(symbol)
    if info is None: return 0.0, 0.0, 0.0001, 1.0
    point = info.point
    # spread p75 desde tick history aproximado con high-low si no hay spreads
    if 'spread' in df.columns and df['spread'].notna().any():
        spread_pts = np.percentile(df['spread'].dropna(), PARAMS['spread_pct_for_p75'])
    else:
        spread_pts = info.spread if info.spread>0 else 10
    spread_price = spread_pts * point
    tick_value = info.trade_tick_value or 1.0
    tick_size  = info.trade_tick_size or point
    return spread_price, PARAMS['commission_per_lot'], tick_size, tick_value

def calc_lots(symbol, equity, sl_price_dist):
    info = mt5.symbol_info(symbol)
    if info is None or sl_price_dist<=0: return 0.0
    tick_value = info.trade_tick_value or 1.0
    tick_size  = info.trade_tick_size or info.point
    risk_usd = equity * PARAMS['risk_pct']
    loss_per_lot = (sl_price_dist / tick_size) * tick_value
    if loss_per_lot<=0: return 0.0
    lots = risk_usd / loss_per_lot
    step = info.volume_step or 0.01
    lots = math.floor(lots/step)*step
    lots = max(info.volume_min, min(info.volume_max, lots))
    return round(lots, 2)

# ---------------- SESIONES ----------------
def session_open(symbol, ts):
    """Heuristica: usa symbol_info_sessions_trade si disponible; fallback ventana."""
    info = mt5.symbol_info(symbol)
    if info is None: return True
    if symbol == 'BTCUSD':
        # 24/7 con bloqueo mantenimiento sabado 21-22 UTC
        if ts.weekday()==5 and 21<=ts.hour<22: return False
        return True
    # ventana bursatil tipica europea/US 07:00-20:30 UTC
    h = ts.hour + ts.minute/60.0
    return 7.0 <= h <= 20.5

def minutes_to_close(symbol, ts):
    if symbol=='BTCUSD': return 9999
    close_h = 20.5
    cur = ts.hour + ts.minute/60.0
    return (close_h - cur)*60

# ---------------- DIVERGENCIAS / PIVOTS ----------------
def is_pivot_low(df, idx, L, R):
    if idx-L<0 or idx+R>=len(df): return False
    window_low = df['low'].iloc[idx-L:idx+R+1].min()
    return df['low'].iloc[idx] == window_low and df['low'].iloc[idx] < df['low'].iloc[idx-1]

def is_pivot_high(df, idx, L, R):
    if idx-L<0 or idx+R>=len(df): return False
    window_high = df['high'].iloc[idx-L:idx+R+1].max()
    return df['high'].iloc[idx] == window_high and df['high'].iloc[idx] > df['high'].iloc[idx-1]

def find_last_pivot_low(df, before_idx, L, R, lookback=80):
    start = max(L, before_idx-lookback)
    for j in range(before_idx-1, start-1, -1):
        if is_pivot_low(df, j, L, R):
            return j
    return None

def find_last_pivot_high(df, before_idx, L, R, lookback=80):
    start = max(L, before_idx-lookback)
    for j in range(before_idx-1, start-1, -1):
        if is_pivot_high(df, j, L, R):
            return j
    return None

# ---------------- BACKTEST POR SIMBOLO ----------------
def backtest_symbol(symbol, group_state):
    df = prepare(symbol)
    if df is None or len(df)<500:
        print(f'[{symbol}] sin datos suficientes'); return None, []
    spread_price, commission, tick_size, tick_value = estimate_costs(symbol, df)
    L, R = PARAMS['pivot_left'], PARAMS['pivot_right']

    equity = INITIAL_EQUITY
    trades = []
    open_pos = None
    pending = []  # cola FIFO por simbolo: (bar_idx_signal, direction, atr_val)
    consec_losses = 0
    pause_until = None
    day_start_equity = equity
    day = None
    dd_pause_day = None
    equity_curve = []

    for i in range(R+1, len(df)-1):
        bar = df.iloc[i]
        ts = df.index[i]
        next_open = df['open'].iloc[i+1]
        next_ts = df.index[i+1]

        # daily DD tracking
        d = ts.date()
        if day != d:
            day = d
            day_start_equity = equity
        dd_day = (equity-day_start_equity)/day_start_equity if day_start_equity>0 else 0
        if dd_day < -0.10:
            dd_pause_day = d

        # ---- GESTION POSICION ABIERTA ----
        if open_pos is not None:
            high_i = df['high'].iloc[i]; low_i = df['low'].iloc[i]
            p = open_pos
            exit_reason = None; exit_price = None

            if p['dir']=='long':
                # partial TP
                if not p['partial_done'] and high_i >= p['tp']:
                    pnl_partial = (p['tp']-p['entry']) * (p['lots']*0.5) * (tick_value/tick_size)
                    p['realized'] += pnl_partial
                    p['partial_done'] = True
                    p['sl'] = p['entry']  # breakeven
                    p['lots_rem'] = p['lots']*0.5
                # trailing activacion
                if p['partial_done']:
                    if high_i - p['entry'] >= PARAMS['trail_act_long_mult']*p['atr']:
                        new_sl = high_i - PARAMS['trail_dist_long_mult']*p['atr']
                        if new_sl > p['sl']: p['sl'] = new_sl
                # SL hit
                if low_i <= p['sl']:
                    exit_price = p['sl']; exit_reason='SL/Trail' if p['partial_done'] else 'SL'
                # timeout
                elif (i - p['bar_idx']) >= PARAMS['timeout_bars']:
                    exit_price = next_open; exit_reason='Timeout'
                # session close
                elif minutes_to_close(symbol, next_ts) < 5 and symbol!='BTCUSD':
                    exit_price = next_open; exit_reason='SessionClose'
            else:  # short
                if not p['partial_done'] and low_i <= p['tp']:
                    pnl_partial = (p['entry']-p['tp']) * (p['lots']*0.5) * (tick_value/tick_size)
                    p['realized'] += pnl_partial
                    p['partial_done'] = True
                    p['sl'] = p['entry']
                    p['lots_rem'] = p['lots']*0.5
                if p['partial_done']:
                    if p['entry'] - low_i >= PARAMS['trail_act_short_mult']*p['atr']:
                        new_sl = low_i + PARAMS['trail_dist_short_mult']*p['atr']
                        if new_sl < p['sl']: p['sl'] = new_sl
                if high_i >= p['sl']:
                    exit_price = p['sl']; exit_reason='SL/Trail' if p['partial_done'] else 'SL'
                elif (i - p['bar_idx']) >= PARAMS['timeout_bars']:
                    exit_price = next_open; exit_reason='Timeout'
                elif minutes_to_close(symbol, next_ts) < 5 and symbol!='BTCUSD':
                    exit_price = next_open; exit_reason='SessionClose'

            if exit_price is not None:
                if p['dir']=='long':
                    pnl_rem = (exit_price - p['entry']) * p['lots_rem'] * (tick_value/tick_size)
                else:
                    pnl_rem = (p['entry'] - exit_price) * p['lots_rem'] * (tick_value/tick_size)
                pnl = p['realized'] + pnl_rem - p['cost']
                equity += pnl
                trades.append({
                    'symbol':symbol,'direction':p['dir'],
                    'entry_time':p['entry_time'],'entry_price':p['entry'],
                    'exit_time':next_ts if exit_reason in ('Timeout','SessionClose') else ts,
                    'exit_price':exit_price,'sl':p['sl_init'],'tp':p['tp'],
                    'lots':p['lots'],'pnl':pnl,'pnl_pct':pnl/INITIAL_EQUITY*100,
                    'obv_div':p['obv_div'],'macd_div':p['macd_div'],
                    'exit_reason':exit_reason
                })
                consec_losses = consec_losses+1 if pnl<0 else 0
                if consec_losses>=4: pause_until = ts + timedelta(hours=4)
                group_state[p['group']] -= 1
                open_pos = None
            equity_curve.append((ts, equity))
            if open_pos is not None:
                continue

        # pausas
        if pause_until and ts < pause_until: 
            equity_curve.append((ts,equity)); continue
        if dd_pause_day == d:
            equity_curve.append((ts,equity)); continue
        if not session_open(symbol, ts):
            equity_curve.append((ts,equity)); continue
        if minutes_to_close(symbol, ts) < 30 and symbol!='BTCUSD':
            equity_curve.append((ts,equity)); continue

        # ---- DETECCION SENAL (en barra i, sin lookahead: pivot en i-R) ----
        signal_dir = None
        obv_div_val=None; macd_div_val=None
        pivot_idx_check = i - R
        if pivot_idx_check >= L:
            # bullish: pivot low confirmado en pivot_idx_check
            if is_pivot_low(df, pivot_idx_check, L, R):
                prev = find_last_pivot_low(df, pivot_idx_check, L, R)
                if prev is not None:
                    if (df['low'].iloc[pivot_idx_check] < df['low'].iloc[prev] and
                        df['obv'].iloc[pivot_idx_check] > df['obv'].iloc[prev] and
                        df['macd_line'].iloc[pivot_idx_check] > df['macd_line'].iloc[prev]):
                        if (bar['adx']>PARAMS['min_adx'] and bar['plus_di_h1']>bar['minus_di_h1']):
                            signal_dir='long'
                            obv_div_val = df['obv'].iloc[pivot_idx_check] - df['obv'].iloc[prev]
                            macd_div_val= df['macd_line'].iloc[pivot_idx_check]-df['macd_line'].iloc[prev]
            elif is_pivot_high(df, pivot_idx_check, L, R):
                prev = find_last_pivot_high(df, pivot_idx_check, L, R)
                if prev is not None:
                    if (df['high'].iloc[pivot_idx_check] > df['high'].iloc[prev] and
                        df['obv'].iloc[pivot_idx_check] < df['obv'].iloc[prev] and
                        df['macd_line'].iloc[pivot_idx_check] < df['macd_line'].iloc[prev]):
                        if (bar['adx']>PARAMS['min_adx'] and bar['minus_di_h1']>bar['plus_di_h1']):
                            signal_dir='short'
                            obv_div_val = df['obv'].iloc[pivot_idx_check]-df['obv'].iloc[prev]
                            macd_div_val= df['macd_line'].iloc[pivot_idx_check]-df['macd_line'].iloc[prev]

        if signal_dir is not None and not np.isnan(bar['atr']):
            pending.append({'bar_idx':i,'dir':signal_dir,'atr':bar['atr'],
                            'obv_div':obv_div_val,'macd_div':macd_div_val})

        # purgar pending expirados
        pending = [s for s in pending if (i - s['bar_idx']) <= PARAMS['queue_ttl_bars']]

        # ---- INTENTAR ABRIR (FIFO) ----
        if open_pos is None and pending:
            grp = next((g for g,syms in GROUPS.items() if symbol in syms), None)
            if group_state.get(grp,0) < PARAMS['max_per_group']:
                sig = pending.pop(0)
                atr_v = sig['atr']
                sl_dist = PARAMS['sl_mult']*atr_v
                sl_dist = max(sl_dist, 3*spread_price)  # SL>=3x spread
                if sig['dir']=='long':
                    entry = next_open + spread_price  # costo spread al abrir (E)
                    sl = entry - sl_dist
                    tp = entry + PARAMS['tp_mult']*atr_v
                else:
                    entry = next_open - spread_price
                    sl = entry + sl_dist
                    tp = entry - PARAMS['tp_mult']*atr_v
                lots = calc_lots(symbol, equity, sl_dist)
                if lots>0:
                    cost = commission*lots  # comision round-trip al abrir (E)
                    open_pos = {
                        'dir':sig['dir'],'entry':entry,'entry_time':next_ts,
                        'sl':sl,'sl_init':sl,'tp':tp,'lots':lots,'lots_rem':lots,
                        'atr':atr_v,'bar_idx':i+1,'partial_done':False,
                        'realized':0.0,'cost':cost,'group':grp,
                        'obv_div':sig['obv_div'],'macd_div':sig['macd_div']
                    }
                    group_state[grp] = group_state.get(grp,0)+1
        equity_curve.append((ts,equity))

    return equity_curve, trades

# ---------------- MAIN ----------------
def load_ckpt():
    if os.path.exists(CKPT):
        with open(CKPT) as f: return json.load(f)
    return {'done':[], 'results':{}}

def save_ckpt(ck):
    with open(CKPT,'w') as f: json.dump(ck,f,default=str,indent=2)

def main():
    if not mt5.initialize():
        print('MT5 init failed'); return
    ck = load_ckpt()
    all_trades = []
    all_curves = {}
    group_state = {g:0 for g in GROUPS}

    for sym in SYMBOLS:
        if sym in ck['done']:
            print(f'[{sym}] cached'); continue
        print(f'>> backtesting {sym}')
        if not mt5.symbol_select(sym, True):
            print(f'  cannot select {sym}'); continue
        curve, trades = backtest_symbol(sym, group_state)
        if curve is None: continue
        all_curves[sym] = curve
        all_trades.extend(trades)
        ck['done'].append(sym)
        ck['results'][sym] = {'trades':len(trades),
                              'final_equity': curve[-1][1] if curve else INITIAL_EQUITY}
        save_ckpt(ck)

    # CSV
    df_tr = pd.DataFrame(all_trades)
    csv_path = os.path.join(OUT_DIR,'trades.csv')
    df_tr.to_csv(csv_path, index=False)
    print(f'CSV: {csv_path} ({len(df_tr)} trades)')

    # HTML
    fig = make_subplots(rows=2, cols=1, subplot_titles=('Equity por simbolo','Heatmap horario PnL'))
    for sym,curve in all_curves.items():
        if not curve: continue
        t,e = zip(*curve)
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=list(t),y=list(e),name=sym,mode='lines'), row=1, col=1)
    if not df_tr.empty:
        df_tr['hour'] = pd.to_datetime(df_tr['entry_time']).dt.hour
        hm = df_tr.groupby(['symbol','hour'])['pnl'].sum().unstack(fill_value=0)
        fig.add_trace(go.Heatmap(z=hm.values,x=hm.columns,y=hm.index,colorscale='RdYlGn'), row=2, col=1)
    html_path = os.path.join(OUT_DIR,'report.html')
    fig.write_html(html_path)
    print(f'HTML: {html_path}')
    mt5.shutdown()

if __name__=='__main__':
    main()
warnings: session_close_time usa heuristica 07:00-20:30 UTC; en live usar mt5.symbol_info_sessions_trade por dia
BTCUSD bloquea solo sabado 21-22 UTC por mantenimiento; ajustar segun broker real
Cola FIFO de senales gestionada por simbolo; coordinador cross-symbol del grupo debe agregarse en live
Spread p75 estimado desde columna 'spread' de copy_rates si disponible; sino fallback a info.spread
Commission IC Markets Raw asumida $7/lot round-trip; revisar por instrumento (CFD vs metales vs cripto)
NETH25 y SE30 tienen spreads y liquidez significativamente variables en horario extendido; el fallback a info.spread puede subestimar costos reales en aperturas/cierres de sesion europea

OBV calculado con tick_volume de MT5: para indices CFD el tick_volume es un proxy de actividad, no volumen real negociado; la divergencia OBV puede generar senales espurias en instrumentos donde el broker reporta tick_volume de forma inconsistente

La heuristica de sesion (07:00-20:30 UTC fija) no contempla cambios de horario de verano/invierno (DST) en Europa; STOXX50/DE40 cierran 22:00 UTC en MT5 IC Markets pero el mercado subyacente cierra 17:30 CET; en live puede haber spread muy elevado en tramo 17:30-22:00 sin filtro
SE30 (OMX Stockholm 30) tiene liquidez mucho menor que DE40 o UK100; el filtro tick_volume>0 no garantiza liquidez suficiente para divergencias OBV confiables

El backtest gestiona group_state como variable compartida entre simbolos pero los llama secuencialmente (no en paralelo); en live con multiples instrumentos corriendo simultaneamente, el contador de grupo debe ser thread-safe o gestionado por un coordinador central
BTCUSD con commission $7/lot round-trip es incorrecto segun referencia IC Markets: son $5/lado = $10 round-trip por lote; esto afecta el breakeven real de BTCUSD significativamente en el backtest
El trailing asimetrico short (act@1.0xATR, dist@0.5xATR) es muy agresivo: puede ser sacado por ruido normal en M5 antes de que el trade alcance su potencial, especialmente en BTCUSD con spread ~$15

El lookback fijo de 80 barras para buscar pivot previo puede no encontrar divergencias validas en tendencias fuertes y largas, generando ausencia de senales en exactamente los mercados que ADX>25 implica
El calculo de lots usa INITIAL_EQUITY fijo en lugar de equity dinamico actualizado; en varias iteraciones del backtest el riesgo real por trade diverge del 2% objetivo

La cola FIFO tiene TTL de 2 velas M5 (10 min); senales validas generadas cerca del cierre de sesion pueden encolarse y ejecutarse en la apertura del dia siguiente si el filtro de sesion no purga el pending correctamente

merge_asof con direction='backward' para M15 y H1 es correcto conceptualmente pero el timestamp del merge usa el time del cierre de la barra M5; si hay gaps (fines de semana, noticias) puede asignar valores ADX/DI de muchas horas atras como si fueran actuales
El circuit breaker L1 (4 perdidas consecutivas, pausa 4h) se resetea al abrir nueva sesion sin persistencia; si el bot se reinicia intraday, el contador se pierde
Pivot detection relies on exact equality checks in float precision, which may cause issues due to floating-point precision errors.
The strategy backtest assumes a fixed trailing stop methodology that could be overly aggressive, particularly in volatile or wider spread instruments like BTCUSD.
Multiple sessions and dynamic trading days (e.g., daylight saving) are not fully catered for in session management, potentially causing incorrect session closure or opening times.
There is a reliance on broker-specific configurations (e.g., commission setup, symbol naming) that could lead to discrepancies in the live environment.
FIFO queue for signals could execute outside intended session periods without correct purging logic.
critical: Verificar volume_step y volume_min reales por simbolo antes de live; calc_lots usa floor a step pero algunos CFD indices tienen step=1.0
Pivot detection requiere R=3 barras futuras: confirmacion solo en barra i con pivot en i-3, entrada en i+1 (sin lookahead garantizado)
ATR(14) en M5 calculado sobre cierres pasados; usar m5['atr'].iloc[i] para sizing y entrada en open i+1

XTIUSD (WTI Crude Oil) en IC Markets MT5 tiene contrato en barriles con tick_value variable segun precio del subyacente; calc_lots usa trade_tick_value estatico del moment de inicializacion pero este valor cambia con el precio del crudo, causando sizing incorrecto y potencial sobreapalancamiento

R:R no viable para BTCUSD: spread ~$15 mas comision $10 round-trip = $25 costo fijo; con sl_mult=1.5 y ATR M5 de BTC tipicamente 50-150 USD, el SL puede ser 75-225 USD pero el breakeven requiere aproximadamente 11-33% del SL solo en costos; con TP=3xATR el ratio neto se degrada a menos de 2:1 en escenarios de ATR bajo, y el filtro 'SL>=3x spread' es insuficiente porque spread aqui es en USD por punto, no en pips estandar

La deteccion de pivot usa is_pivot_low con condicion 'df.low.iloc[idx] == window_low': en datos OHLC de MT5 con precision de punto flotante, igualdad exacta puede fallar por errores de redondeo; usar tolerancia (abs(low - window_low) < point*0.5) o la senal nunca se dispara en algunos simbolos

SE30 no existe como simbolo estandar en IC Markets MT5; el simbolo real es tipicamente 'SWI20' o similar segun el broker; mt5.symbol_select('SE30', True) fallara silenciosamente (retorna None) y el simbolo se omite sin alerta critica en el codigo, pero la spec lo lista como instrumento principal sin verificacion de disponibilidad

El backtest comparte una sola instancia de equity=INITIAL_EQUITY por simbolo en backtest_symbol pero group_state es global; la interaccion cross-simbolo del grupo no esta correctamente simulada: dos simbolos del mismo grupo pueden abrir simultaneamente en el backtest superando el limite max_per_group=2 porque cada llamada a backtest_symbol es secuencial sobre datos historicos con timestamps que se solapan, no hay sincronizacion temporal real entre simbolos

Circuit breaker L2 (DD>10% diario) se evalua como (equity - day_start_equity) / day_start_equity pero day_start_equity se fija al inicio del dia calendario UTC; para indices europeos el dia de trading empieza a las 07:00 UTC pero el reset diario ocurre a medianoche UTC, desincronizando la ventana de DD real de la sesion de trading con la ventana de calculo
mt5_notes: The OBV-MACD divergence strategy requires calculating multiple indicators, which can be achieved using pandas, numpy, and possibly ta-lib within the given MT5 Python polling constraints.

Detecting entry signals with a 20-30 second polling interval is generally reliable if OHLCV data aligns tightly with the MT5 data updates. With this strategy, pivot confirmations require specific historical data handling, which can be processed within these constraints.
Order placement using market orders with filling IOC (Immediate or Cancel) and a fixed deviation is appropriate due to signal latency and market conditions.
Ensure indicators are backfilled correctly, particularly when there are session gaps, as merging indicator data can sometimes lead to mismatches in time alignment.

bot_specs.backtest_code:
import MetaTrader5 as mt5
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import json
import os
from datetime import datetime, timezone
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots

# =========================================
# CONFIG
# =========================================
SYMBOLS = ['EURUSD', 'GBPUSD', 'USDJPY', 'AUDUSD']
TF_ENTRY = mt5.TIMEFRAME_M15
TF_SUPPORT = mt5.TIMEFRAME_H1
BARS = 60000  # ~ aprox 1.7 aÃ±os M15
INITIAL_EQUITY = 10000.0
RISK_PCT = 0.01  # 1% por trade

# Parametros
RSI_PERIOD = 14
ATR_PERIOD = 14
ADX_PERIOD = 14
RSI_TH_LOW = 30
RSI_TH_HIGH = 70
SL_MULT = 1.5
TP_MULT = 2.5
TIMEOUT_BARS = 48
DIV_LOOKBACK = 20
SWING_MARGIN = 2
ADX_MAX_M15 = 28
ADX_MAX_H1 = 30
SESSION_START_UTC = 6
SESSION_END_UTC = 17

# IC Markets Raw: comision aprox $7 por lote round trip = $3.5 por lado
COMMISSION_PER_LOT_SIDE = 3.5

CHECKPOINT_FILE = 'backtest_checkpoint.json'
TRADES_CSV = 'trades_rsi_div.csv'
REPORT_HTML = 'backtest_report.html'

# =========================================
# INDICADORES
# =========================================
def rsi(series, period=14):
    delta = series.diff()
    gain = delta.clip(lower=0).ewm(alpha=1/period, adjust=False).mean()
    loss = (-delta.clip(upper=0)).ewm(alpha=1/period, adjust=False).mean()
    rs = gain / loss.replace(0, np.nan)
    return 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))

def atr(df, period=14):
    h, l, c = df['high'], df['low'], df['close']
    tr = pd.concat([h-l, (h-c.shift()).abs(), (l-c.shift()).abs()], axis=1).max(axis=1)
    return tr.ewm(alpha=1/period, adjust=False).mean()

def adx(df, period=14):
    h, l, c = df['high'], df['low'], df['close']
    up = h.diff()
    dn = -l.diff()
    plus_dm = np.where((up > dn) & (up > 0), up, 0.0)
    minus_dm = np.where((dn > up) & (dn > 0), dn, 0.0)
    tr = pd.concat([h-l, (h-c.shift()).abs(), (l-c.shift()).abs()], axis=1).max(axis=1)
    atr_ = tr.ewm(alpha=1/period, adjust=False).mean()
    plus_di = 100 * pd.Series(plus_dm, index=df.index).ewm(alpha=1/period, adjust=False).mean() / atr_
    minus_di = 100 * pd.Series(minus_dm, index=df.index).ewm(alpha=1/period, adjust=False).mean() / atr_
    dx = 100 * (plus_di - minus_di).abs() / (plus_di + minus_di).replace(0, np.nan)
    return dx.ewm(alpha=1/period, adjust=False).mean()

# =========================================
# DIVERGENCIAS (sin lookahead: swing confirmado con margen)
# =========================================
def find_swings(values, margin=2):
    """Retorna arrays con True en swing low/high CONFIRMADOS (con margin barras posteriores)."""
    n = len(values)
    sl = np.zeros(n, dtype=bool)
    sh = np.zeros(n, dtype=bool)
    for i in range(margin, n - margin):
        window = values[i-margin:i+margin+1]
        if values[i] == window.min() and (window == values[i]).sum() == 1:
            sl[i] = True
        if values[i] == window.max() and (window == values[i]).sum() == 1:
            sh[i] = True
    return sl, sh

def detect_divergence(close, rsi_vals, idx, lookback=20, margin=2, kind='bull'):
    """Detecta divergencia confirmada hasta idx-margin (sin lookahead)."""
    end = idx - margin
    start = max(0, end - lookback)
    if end - start < 5:
        return False
    sl, sh = find_swings(close[start:end+1].values, margin=margin)
    sl_rsi, sh_rsi = find_swings(rsi_vals[start:end+1].values, margin=margin)
    if kind == 'bull':
        pts = np.where(sl)[0]
        if len(pts) < 2: return False
        a, b = pts[-2], pts[-1]
        # precio LL y rsi HL
        if close.iloc[start+b] < close.iloc[start+a] and rsi_vals.iloc[start+b] > rsi_vals.iloc[start+a]:
            return True
    else:
        pts = np.where(sh)[0]
        if len(pts) < 2: return False
        a, b = pts[-2], pts[-1]
        if close.iloc[start+b] > close.iloc[start+a] and rsi_vals.iloc[start+b] < rsi_vals.iloc[start+a]:
            return True
    return False

# =========================================
# DATA
# =========================================
def get_data(symbol, tf, bars):
    rates = mt5.copy_rates_from_pos(symbol, tf, 0, bars)
    if rates is None or len(rates) == 0:
        return None
    df = pd.DataFrame(rates)
    df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s', utc=True)
    df.set_index('time', inplace=True)
    return df

def get_symbol_info(symbol):
    info = mt5.symbol_info(symbol)
    if info is None:
        return None
    return {
        'point': info.point,
        'digits': info.digits,
        'trade_contract_size': info.trade_contract_size,
        'volume_min': info.volume_min,
        'volume_step': info.volume_step,
        'tick_value': info.trade_tick_value,
        'tick_size': info.trade_tick_size,
    }

def estimate_spread_p75(df, sinfo):
    if 'spread' in df.columns:
        return float(np.percentile(df['spread'].dropna(), 75)) * sinfo['point']
    return 2 * sinfo['point']

# =========================================
# BACKTEST POR SIMBOLO
# =========================================
def backtest_symbol(symbol):
    print(f'[{symbol}] cargando datos...')
    df = get_data(symbol, TF_ENTRY, BARS)
    df_h1 = get_data(symbol, TF_SUPPORT, BARS // 4)
    if df is None or df_h1 is None:
        print(f'[{symbol}] sin datos')
        return None, []
    sinfo = get_symbol_info(symbol)
    if sinfo is None:
        return None, []

    df['rsi'] = rsi(df['close'], RSI_PERIOD)
    df['atr'] = atr(df, ATR_PERIOD)
    df['adx'] = adx(df, ADX_PERIOD)
    df_h1['adx'] = adx(df_h1, ADX_PERIOD)

    # reindex H1 al M15 (forward fill)
    df['adx_h1'] = df_h1['adx'].reindex(df.index, method='ffill')

    spread_cost = estimate_spread_p75(df, sinfo)

    equity = INITIAL_EQUITY
    equity_curve = []
    trades = []
    in_position = False
    last_signal_bar = -1

    n = len(df)
    for i in range(max(RSI_PERIOD, ATR_PERIOD, ADX_PERIOD, DIV_LOOKBACK) + SWING_MARGIN + 5, n - 1):
        bar = df.iloc[i]
        t = df.index[i]
        equity_curve.append((t, equity))

        if in_position:
            continue

        # filtros
        if pd.isna(bar['rsi']) or pd.isna(bar['atr']) or pd.isna(bar['adx']):
            continue
        if bar['tick_volume'] <= 0:
            continue
        hour = t.hour
        if not (SESSION_START_UTC <= hour < SESSION_END_UTC):
            continue
        if bar['adx'] >= ADX_MAX_M15:
            continue
        if pd.isna(bar['adx_h1']) or bar['adx_h1'] >= ADX_MAX_H1:
            continue
        if i == last_signal_bar:
            continue

        direction = None
        if bar['rsi'] < RSI_TH_LOW:
            if detect_divergence(df['close'].iloc[:i+1], df['rsi'].iloc[:i+1], i, DIV_LOOKBACK, SWING_MARGIN, 'bull'):
                direction = 'long'
        elif bar['rsi'] > RSI_TH_HIGH:
            if detect_divergence(df['close'].iloc[:i+1], df['rsi'].iloc[:i+1], i, DIV_LOOKBACK, SWING_MARGIN, 'bear'):
                direction = 'short'

        if direction is None:
            continue

        # Entrada al Open de la barra i+1
        entry_idx = i + 1
        if entry_idx >= n:
            break
        entry_price = df.iloc[entry_idx]['open']
        entry_time = df.index[entry_idx]
        atr_val = bar['atr']
        last_signal_bar = i

        if direction == 'long':
            sl = entry_price - SL_MULT * atr_val
            tp = entry_price + TP_MULT * atr_val
        else:
            sl = entry_price + SL_MULT * atr_val
            tp = entry_price - TP_MULT * atr_val

        # sizing por riesgo
        sl_dist = abs(entry_price - sl)
        risk_money = equity * RISK_PCT
        tick_val = sinfo['tick_value']
        tick_size = sinfo['tick_size']
        if tick_size == 0 or tick_val == 0:
            continue
        value_per_unit = tick_val / tick_size
        lots = risk_money / (sl_dist * value_per_unit)
        lots = max(sinfo['volume_min'], round(lots / sinfo['volume_step']) * sinfo['volume_step'])
        lots = round(lots, 2)

        # costos al abrir: spread + comision
        spread_money = spread_cost * value_per_unit * lots
        commission = COMMISSION_PER_LOT_SIDE * 2 * lots  # round trip
        cost = spread_money + commission

        # simular salida
        exit_price = None
        exit_time = None
        exit_reason = None
        for j in range(entry_idx, min(entry_idx + TIMEOUT_BARS, n)):
            h = df.iloc[j]['high']
            l = df.iloc[j]['low']
            if direction == 'long':
                if l <= sl:
                    exit_price = sl; exit_time = df.index[j]; exit_reason = 'sl'; break
                if h >= tp:
                    exit_price = tp; exit_time = df.index[j]; exit_reason = 'tp'; break
            else:
                if h >= sl:
                    exit_price = sl; exit_time = df.index[j]; exit_reason = 'sl'; break
                if l <= tp:
                    exit_price = tp; exit_time = df.index[j]; exit_reason = 'tp'; break
        if exit_price is None:
            j_out = min(entry_idx + TIMEOUT_BARS, n - 1)
            exit_price = df.iloc[j_out]['open']
            exit_time = df.index[j_out]
            exit_reason = 'timeout'

        if direction == 'long':
            pnl_raw = (exit_price - entry_price) * value_per_unit * lots
        else:
            pnl_raw = (entry_price - exit_price) * value_per_unit * lots
        pnl = pnl_raw - cost
        pnl_pct = pnl / equity
        equity += pnl
        in_position = False  # cerrado en la misma simulacion

        trades.append({
            'symbol': symbol,
            'direction': direction,
            'entry_time': entry_time,
            'entry_price': entry_price,
            'exit_time': exit_time,
            'exit_price': exit_price,
            'sl': sl,
            'tp': tp,
            'lots': lots,
            'pnl': pnl,
            'pnl_pct': pnl_pct,
            'obv_div': '',
            'macd_div': '',
            'rsi_at_signal': bar['rsi'],
            'adx_at_signal': bar['adx'],
            'exit_reason': exit_reason,
        })

    eq_df = pd.DataFrame(equity_curve, columns=['time', 'equity']).set_index('time')
    return eq_df, trades

# =========================================
# CHECKPOINT
# =========================================
def load_checkpoint():
    if os.path.exists(CHECKPOINT_FILE):
        with open(CHECKPOINT_FILE, 'r') as f:
            return json.load(f)
    return {'done': [], 'trades': []}

def save_checkpoint(cp):
    with open(CHECKPOINT_FILE, 'w') as f:
        json.dump(cp, f, default=str)

# =========================================
# REPORTE
# =========================================
def build_report(equity_curves, trades_df):
    fig = make_subplots(rows=2, cols=1, subplot_titles=('Equity por sÃ­mbolo', 'Heatmap horario PnL'))
    for sym, eq in equity_curves.items():
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(x=eq.index, y=eq['equity'], name=sym, mode='lines'), row=1, col=1)

    if len(trades_df) > 0:
        trades_df['hour'] = pd.to_datetime(trades_df['entry_time']).dt.hour
        heat = trades_df.groupby(['symbol', 'hour'])['pnl'].sum().unstack(fill_value=0)
        fig.add_trace(go.Heatmap(z=heat.values, x=heat.columns, y=heat.index, colorscale='RdYlGn'), row=2, col=1)

    fig.update_layout(height=900, title='Backtest RSI Divergence Reversal M15')
    fig.write_html(REPORT_HTML)
    print(f'Reporte: {REPORT_HTML}')

# =========================================
# MAIN
# =========================================
def main():
    if not mt5.initialize():
        print('MT5 init fallÃ³')
        return
    cp = load_checkpoint()
    all_trades = list(cp.get('trades', []))
    equity_curves = {}

    for sym in SYMBOLS:
        if sym in cp['done']:
            print(f'[{sym}] ya completo')
            continue
        eq_df, trades = backtest_symbol(sym)
        if eq_df is not None:
            equity_curves[sym] = eq_df
            all_trades.extend(trades)
            cp['done'].append(sym)
            cp['trades'] = all_trades
            save_checkpoint(cp)
            print(f'[{sym}] OK | trades={len(trades)}')

    mt5.shutdown()

    trades_df = pd.DataFrame(all_trades)
    if len(trades_df) > 0:
        trades_df.to_csv(TRADES_CSV, index=False)
        print(f'Trades CSV: {TRADES_CSV} ({len(trades_df)} trades)')
        print(f'PnL total: {trades_df["pnl"].sum():.2f}')
        print(f'Winrate: {(trades_df["pnl"]>0).mean()*100:.1f}%')

    if equity_curves:
        build_report(equity_curves, trades_df)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

La detecciÃ³n de divergencias con swing_margin=2 barras implica que la seÃ±al se confirma 2 barras ANTES del cierre de la barra de seÃ±al, pero la entrada se ejecuta al Open de la barra i+1 â esto es correcto en backtest, pero en live el swing final debe estar confirmado con al menos 2 barras cerradas posteriores, lo que agrega 30 minutos de latencia real a la seÃ±al

BARS=60000 en M15 cubre aproximadamente 625 dÃ­as (~1.7 aÃ±os), pero BARS//4=15000 para H1 cubre los mismos 625 dÃ­as, lo cual es correcto; sin embargo, si MT5 no tiene suficientes barras H1 disponibles el backtest no falla explÃ­citamente sino que produce adx_h1=NaN y filtra esas barras silenciosamente

La variable in_position se setea a False inmediatamente despuÃ©s de simular la salida dentro del mismo loop, lo que significa que el backtest permite abrir un nuevo trade en la barra siguiente al cierre de una posiciÃ³n, pero en live MT5 con una sola cuenta podrÃ­a haber slippage o delay de confirmaciÃ³n no modelado

El circuit breaker por racha de pÃ©rdidas (drawdown mÃ¡ximo diario, max consecutive losses) estÃ¡ ausente en el cÃ³digo aunque la spec lo menciona implÃ­citamente con el filtro de spread_p75; no hay parada automÃ¡tica si el equity cae un X% en el dÃ­a

spread_p75 se calcula sobre la columna 'spread' del DataFrame que en MT5 copy_rates_from_pos devuelve el spread en puntos enteros (integer), no en precio; la conversiÃ³n *point puede ser imprecisa para algunos sÃ­mbolos con digits=3 o digits=5

El reporte HTML combina curvas de equity independientes por sÃ­mbolo sin mostrar equity combinada ni drawdown consolidado, lo que dificulta evaluar el riesgo real del portafolio de 4 instrumentos operando simultÃ¡neamente
The divergence detection algorithm has a potential lookahead bias due to improper handling of slice indices.

With the alert to real-time conditions, relying on previously calculated ADX values might add timing discrepancies into a live environment, as they are forward-filled but can be a bar behind in specifics.

Ensure comprehensive handling for risk management, including drawdowns and warranting a circuit breaker to avoid disastrous equity declines.

critical: BUG GRAVE DE LOOKAHEAD en detect_divergence: la funciÃ³n recibe df['close'].iloc[:i+1] y df['rsi'].iloc[:i+1] (Ã­ndice hasta i inclusive), luego internamente calcula end=idx-margin donde idx=i, por lo que end=i-2 y start=max(0, i-2-20). Los swings se buscan en close[start:end+1] que es close[start:i-1], lo cual es correcto. SIN EMBARGO, el parÃ¡metro idx que se pasa es el Ã­ndice DENTRO del slice completo (i), no el Ã­ndice relativo al sub-slice, y la comparaciÃ³n close.iloc[start+b] usa iloc sobre el slice [:i+1] pasado como argumento. Dado que Python iloc sobre un slice ya reducido opera sobre Ã­ndices 0..i, start+b puede apuntar a posiciones que incluyen la barra i si start+b >= i-margin, introduciendo lookahead sutil dependiendo del valor de lookback y la posiciÃ³n de los swings detectados. Debe refactorizarse usando Ã­ndices absolutos y verificando explÃ­citamente que todos los puntos de swing sean estrictamente anteriores a i-margin

AUSENCIA TOTAL DE CIRCUIT BREAKER en el cÃ³digo: la spec define risk_pct=1% pero no hay ningÃºn mecanismo que detenga el bot ante drawdown intradiario excesivo, racha de N pÃ©rdidas consecutivas, o equity por debajo de un umbral mÃ­nimo. Para un bot en live esto es un requisito de seguridad no negociable antes de codificar el EA en MT5

SIMULACIÃN DE SALIDA INCORRECTA â ORDEN DE PRIORIDAD SL/TP NO DETERMINISTA: en el loop de simulaciÃ³n de salida, para cada barra se verifica primero SL y luego TP usando high y low de la misma barra. Si en una barra el low toca el SL y el high toca el TP simultÃ¡neamente (barra con rango mayor que SL+TP combinados), el cÃ³digo siempre asigna SL como salida. En realidad sin datos intra-barra no es posible determinar cuÃ¡l se tocÃ³ primero; el backtest deberÃ­a marcar estos casos como ambiguos o usar el peor caso (SL), pero actualmente lo hace sistemÃ¡ticamente sin documentarlo, y para barras de alta volatilidad esto sesga las mÃ©tricas de winrate hacia abajo de forma no representativa

EL BACKTEST NO MODELA POSICIONES SIMULTÃNEAS MULTI-SÃMBOLO: la variable in_position es local por sÃ­mbolo y los 4 sÃ­mbolos se backtestean secuencialmente con equity compartida. Esto significa que en live, si los 4 pares generan seÃ±al simultÃ¡nea (correlaciÃ³n EURUSD/GBPUSD/AUDUSD es alta), el riesgo real serÃ­a 4% del equity en el mismo momento, no 1%. El backtest reportarÃ¡ resultados que subestiman el drawdown real en escenarios de correlaciÃ³n alta. Debe implementarse un backtest multi-sÃ­mbolo consolidado con equity Ãºnica y lÃ­mite de exposiciÃ³n simultÃ¡nea

Entry signals are determined by price and RSI divergences, filtered by ADX values and session constraints, which can reliably be detected in a 20-30 second polling interval provided the indicators are calculated accurately.
The order placement at the next bar open aligns with the market order type, considering the latency involved.

spec_fields.senal: LONG: RSI(14) < 30 + divergencia alcista. SHORT: RSI(14) > 70 + divergencia bajista
